question: List all the distinct product names, price and descriptions which are bought by female customers.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT p.product_name, p.product_price, p.product_description FROM Products p JOIN Order_Items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id JOIN Orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN Customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE c.gender_code = 'Female';

back_translation.intent: 获取不重复的女性客户购买的商品信息

semantic.reason: SQL反向翻译描述中未体现DISTINCT关键字，而原始问题明确要求列出不重复的商品信息。
